title: nRF Development environment
description: nRF Development environment documents development environment material for nRF in the hardware domain. It is classified as an entity page for the mcu-family class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page provides focused notes, examples, commands, diagrams, or references when the source content provides them. Important search terms include nrf development environment, development-environment, and hardware, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is hardware / nrf / development-environment, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
